clips.title: Meet The Whisperer
clips.description:
Meet The Whisperer

'The Whisperer' takes patience to an art form, and we're not talking about putting. #golf #whisperer #cartoon #monologue

#golf #whisperer #cartoon #monologue
clips.note: Director 92/100 — First line 'Meet 'The Whisperer,' who swings so softly you'd swear he’s playing with a putter' stops the scroll

clips.title: The Ball-Marking Mystery
clips.description:
The Ball-Marking Mystery

A rant about the bizarre and unwritten rule of ball marking in golf. #golf #shorts #etiquette #funny #rules

#golf #shorts #etiquette #funny #rules #rant
clips.note: Director 74/100 — clears the air with a relatable rant about golf etiquette
